This art exhibit embraces the Playa District’s history as the main horse trading spot during the Spanish Colonization. There are eight different horses all over town, all of which have a particular name and personality. The Marina is a hot spot for local artists as they showcase their most recent work. Immerse yourself in the Aruban art movement by just taking an elevator to the lower floor, where 20+ spaces have been allocated for local contemporary artists. listings.name: Noord Villa
listings.notes: Dream Villa in Noord, Aruba – A Unique Investment Opportunity In the heart of enchanting Noord, Aruba, awaits a property that feels like it was crafted from a dream. Set on an expansive 24,650 sqft (2,290 m²) of meticulously fenced land, this estate offers privacy and security. A grand entrance welcomes you into a space where every detail has been thoughtfully designed. At the center stands the main villa, its terracotta roof and bright walls radiating warmth under the Caribbean sun. Step inside and discover the open-concept living and dining areas, flooded with natural light from large windows that highlight the fine finishes and sophisticated design. The fully equipped kitchen, complete with modern appliances and ample counter space, is perfect for culinary enthusiasts. The bedrooms provide a serene escape, with the main suite featuring an en-suite bathroom that feels like a private sanctuary. Venture outdoors and find yourself immersed in lush greenery and vibrant tropical landscaping. The hotel-resort-style surroundings evoke a sense of tranquility, where the rustling palm trees and the gentle ripple of the exquisite pool set the perfect ambiance. Imagine hosting evening gatherings here, with guests relaxing by the pool under the warm glow of outdoor lights and the gentle Caribbean breeze. Additional living spaces enhance the property’s value. Three separate apartments, each with its own private entrance, provide versatile options. The first is a spacious two-bedroom unit, complete with a kitchen, living area, and bathroom, ideal for long-term guests or generating rental income. The remaining two are cozy studio apartments, each with its own bathroom, perfect for short-term stays or additional rental opportunities. This villa offers not just a beautiful residence but a wise investment. Its prime location in one of Aruba’s most desirable areas ensures that whether you choose to call it home or leverage it for rental income, you’re set to enjoy the best of island living. With pristine beaches, exceptional dining, and vibrant shopping districts nearby, the possibilities are endless. As the sun sets over Noord, the villa’s lights illuminate the property with a warm, welcoming glow. This is a place where memories are created, and every day feels like a vacation. bike gps Property Details: Beds: 7 Baths: 5 Price (in AWG): 3,450,000.- Built up area: 541 m² / 5,823.27 ft² Land Size: 2,290 m² Reference Number: Noord Vill

listings.name: Eagle’s Hidden Gem – Dual-Parcel Estate with Bonus Buildable Lot
listings.notes: Just minutes from world-famous Eagle Beach, this private, move-in-ready two-level villa sits on a rare 1,280 m² of freehold land, combining a beautifully maintained residence with an adjoining bonus buildable lot (459 m² separate title). This configuration offers the flexibility to expand, subdivide, or reconfigure, making it both a luxury home and a strong long-term investment. Property Highlights – Land : 1,280 m² total | Two connected freehold parcels (821 m² + 459 m²) – Zoning : Stedelijk Woongebied (urban residential – medium density) – Construction : Exceptionally solid poured and reinforced concrete throughout – all floors, ceilings, roof, and corner reinforcements ensure durability and hurricane resistance. – Main villa : Two levels, each approx. 93 m² (total 186 m² built) • The downstairs level includes divided rooms (sheetrock partitions), a small kitchen counter with sink and outlets, a toilet, and independent access — ideal for reconfiguration into living units or offices. • With minimal internal adjustments, the space can be converted into one or two full apartments, doubling the home’s bedrooms and bathrooms and creating a 4–6 bedroom, 4-bathroom layout. – Guest/staff quarters : Separate bedroom and bathroom with private access – Outdoor area : Renovated pool with fenced deck, outdoor shower, and toilet – Outdoor living : Large covered patio with full outdoor kitchen and BBQ area – Garden & privacy : Fully paved garden and driveway, with remote-controlled gate and 3.5-meter-high perimeter walls ensuring total privacy. Mature tropical garden with multiple palm trees and lush greenery. – Utilities : Hot and cold water system | 10 kW solar installation | irrigation system | storm shutters throughout – Parking : Secure gated driveway for 2–3 cars, with remote-enabled electric gate Bonus Buildable Lot – 459 m² Freehold Parcel Included in the estate is a second buildable parcel (459 m² freehold) with its own meetbrief (confirming ownership and cadastral boundaries). This adjoining lot is fully fenced and accessible from the same gated entrance, offering multiple options: – Build a second residence, guest villa, or rental units – Extend the tropical garden or pool area for additional privacy – Subdivide and sell as a separate property in the future Investment Potential – Dual-parcel flexibility : Each parcel has its own meetbrief, allowing independent sale, new construction, or combined estate use. – Ready-to-convert lower level : Alrea

From the private balcony, enjoy beautiful panoramic views of the Palm Beach area, an ideal spot to unwind with your morning coffee or take in Aruba’s stunning sunsets.The condo also features the convenience of an in-unit washer and dryer, hot water, and modern finishes throughout. Residents enjoy the peace of mind of a gated community with 24-hour security, along with access to an on-site gym and lushly landscaped surroundings. Just steps away, the turquoise waters of Palm Beach await, along with Aruba’s finest dining, shopping, and entertainment options.This condo is a wonderful opportunity for those seeking a full-time residence, vacation retreat, or investment property in one of Aruba’s most desirable locations.Contact us today for more information or to schedule a viewing!

listings.name: Palm Aruba Condo
listings.notes: Beautiful 2-Bedroom Condo for Sale in Palm Aruba, where Every Sunset Feels Like Yours!The late afternoon sun drifts gently across the sky as you turn into the gated entrance of Palm Aruba, a quiet oasis tucked into the vibrant heart of Palm Beach. The world outside hums with energy beaches, restaurants, laughter, music but here, there’s a sense of calm, of arrival.As you step inside the condo, the first thing you notice is the light. It pours through the open living space, reflecting softly off the marble floors and rising effortlessly toward the high ceilings above. The layout feels natural and unforced the living room blending into the dining area, the kitchen inviting conversation, connection, and easy living. The home will be sold fully furnished with brand-new furniture, making it move-in ready from day one.Upstairs, the master suite waits like a private retreat. It’s quiet here, removed just enough to feel like your own corner of the world. Mornings begin slowly, with soft light filtering in, and evenings end in comfort, with your own en-suite space offering both privacy and ease.Downstairs, another bedroom and full bathroom provide space for guests, family, or even a home office flexible, welcoming, ready to adapt to your life.But it’s the evenings that truly define this home.As the day winds down, you settle into the living room. Outside, the sky begins its transformation gold melting into orange, then deepening into shades of pink and violet. The sunset becomes part of your daily rhythm, a quiet spectacle that never feels ordinary. It’s not just a view; it’s a ritual.Life here extends beyond your front door. A short walk leads you to the pool, where palm trees sway gently in the breeze. The gym is there when you want it, the landscaped grounds always inviting. And just beyond the gates, Palm Beach offers everything soft white sand, turquoise water, lively evenings, and endless choice.This isn’t just a condo. It’s a place where days feel lighter, evenings feel richer, and every moment carries a touch of island ease.And it’s waiting for you.Contact us today for more information or to schedule a viewing!

listings.name: Nanki Boutique Condos (Pre - Construction)
listings.notes: Oceanfront condos for sale!Nanki at Rodgers Beach Aruba is the new whole ownership boutique condo-hotel that will make your dreams come true. The property boasts 40 exclusive condos with high-end designs, top-of-the-line finishes, abundant scenic surroundings and hotel services at your disposal. There’s no better way to enjoy the beautiful white sand beaches and multicultural experience the island has to offer. Rodgers Beach, one of the Caribbean’s most private and naturally beautiful areas, has every amenity you may want from an oceanfront property in Aruba. The complex consists of 1-bedroom and 2-bedroom units. This new property in Aruba will have a lot for you to enjoy with its ideal location, secure neighborhood, close-knit community, and closeness to famous tourist spots and breathtaking attractions like Boca Grandi and the Arikok National Park.Details:- 40 Exclusive Condo’s- Price starts at $ 475,989 for a 1-bed/1 -bath | HOA Fee $ 7 per m2- Sophisticated Comforts- High-End Design- Concierge Services- La Piragua Roof Top Lounge - Beachside Pool and Bar- Fitness Center- Lobby/Business Center- Powered by Solar Panels

listings.name: Casa Playa Downtown Condos
listings.notes: Experience downtown living with Casa Playa Condos!Welcome to Oranjestad's newest condominium development currently known as the famous "Royal Plaza" building nestled downtown, where the vibrant energy of the city meets the tranquil beauty of the ocean. This architectural masterpiece seamlessly integrates Dutch Caribbean influences, offering a harmonious blend of tradition and modern luxury. Rising proudly against the azure backdrop of the Caribbean Sea, this exclusive building boasts 62 meticulously designed units, ranging from 1 to 3 bedrooms. The exterior reflects the distinctive charm of Dutch Caribbean architecture, characterized by colorful facades, arched windows, and intricate detailing that pay homage to the rich cultural heritage of the region. Step into a world of refined living, where every detail has been thoughtfully considered to enhance your lifestyle. Residents can unwind and bask in the breathtaking scenery.For those seeking relaxation and recreation, the development features an inviting swimming pool where residents can lounge and enjoy the Caribbean sun. Stay active and energized in the fully equipped gym, perfect for maintaining a healthy lifestyle. Indulge in a quiet escape within the cozy library, offering a retreat for book lovers or those seeking a serene space to work or reflect. The development also offers the convenience of valet parking, ensuring a seamless and luxurious arrival experience for residents and their guests.This condominium development is not just a home; it's a lifestyle. Immerse yourself in the dynamic culture of Oranjestad, with its vibrant stores, charming cafes, and lively atmosphere, all just steps away from your doorstep.Starting at USD 394,554.00 | Size starts at 49.20 m2 (530 sq.ft.)Choose from 1-2- or 3-bedroom condos.Contact us for more information!

listings.name: Curiburi Estates Full Ownership Land Lot 8
listings.notes: Welcome to the exclusive development of "Curuburi Estates"Curuburi Estates is an exceptionally upscale development situated in a tranquil rural setting, conveniently located just a 10-minute drive from the airport, Oranjestad, and the stunning Eagle Beach. It's also a mere 3-minute drive away from the captivating North Coast. The project comprises 12 spacious plots featuring diverse green spaces and charming rock formations within a picturesque natural environment. The primary goal of this project is to conserve as much of the original vegetation as feasible. Ascending over a ridge, meandering through lush greenery, a 250-meter access road will be built. This road gracefully descends from the verdant hillside and gently enters the valley of Curuburi Estates nestled between two rolling hills.Within the confines of Curuburi Estates, the primary goal is the preservation of the stunning natural surroundings, cultivating a cohesive, exclusive 'natural' ambiance. This development is perfectly tailored for homes designed to harmonize with Aruba's climate.Lot 8 is 1535 m2 (16522 sq.ft.) for USD 391,118 / Afl. 696.190Contact us for more information.

This road gracefully descends from the verdant hillside and gently enters the valley of Curuburi Estates nestled between two rolling hills.Within the confines of Curuburi Estates, the primary goal is the preservation of the stunning natural surroundings, cultivating a cohesive, exclusive 'natural' ambiance. This development is perfectly tailored for homes designed to harmonize with Aruba's climate.Don't miss out on this opportunity to become part of this exclusive project! Lot 12 is 724 m2 (7793 sq.ft.) for USD 200,693 / Afl. 357.233Contact us for more information.

The generous 605m2 plots also leaves room for landscaping and outdoor enhancements, perfect for creating your private oasis in San Nicolas.If you're ready to embark on an exciting journey of transformation and want to turn this house into the gem it can be, seize the moment and make this property yours today! I have plenty of concepts to share.

listings.name: The Penthouse at Divi Residences Unit 15
listings.notes: Discover the ultimate combination of luxury living, resort-style convenience, and solid investment performance in this stunning ocean and golf course-view penthouse at the award-winning Divi Village Golf & Beach Resort. With 3 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, and a massive 1,500 sq. ft. private deck, this two-story residence offers a rare opportunity to own a spacious retreat just a5-minute walk from Eagle Beach— one of the top beaches in the world —combined with all amenities of an upscale resort.

listings.name: Spectacular Penthouse Condo at Divi Golf & Beach Resort
listings.notes: This penthouse is just a5-minute walk from the iconic Eagle Beach, consistently ranked among theTop 10 Beaches in the World. Imagine stepping out of your door and strolling to soft white sands, calm turquoise waters, and a laid-back beach bar for sunset cocktails. Whether you love swimming, sunbathing, paddleboarding, or simply watching the waves roll in,Eagle Beach is your backyard.

listings.name: Azure Beach Residences 725
listings.notes: From the moment you step inside, your eyes are immediately drawn beyond the interior, straight to the endless turquoise horizon. At this height, you enjoy arare panoramic vantage point, where the Caribbean Sea stretches infinitely before you, sunsets paint the sky in gold and coral, and the soothing sound of the ocean becomes part of your everyday life. The 7th floor offers the perfect balance: high enough for spectacular, unobstructed views, yet intimate enough to feel connected to the beach and shoreline below.

listings.name: O Condominium unit 2
listings.notes: Residents of O Condominium enjoy resort-style amenities, including a swimming pool, fitness center, 24/7 security, and beautifully maintained common areas. Ideally situated near Aruba’s best beaches, dining, shopping, and entertainment, this condo offers the perfect balance of tranquility and convenience.

listings.name: Azure Beach Residences Unit 126
listings.notes: Extras include a storage room, a dedicated parking spot, and a garage. The complex also offers two pools, 24/7 security, and on-site restaurants. With direct ocean views and a secure, sought-after location, Azure isn’t just a home, it’s a lifestyle.

listings.name: Wariruri 214
listings.notes: Welcome to Wariruri Condominiums, one of Aruba’s most desirable resort-style communities. Perfectly located in the upscale Rooi Santo neighborhood on the island’s north side, this gated development offers the ideal balance of comfort, tranquility, and luxury living. Whether you’re looking for a vacation getaway, a full-time residence, or a premium investment, Wariruri Unit 214 offers a rare opportunity.

listings.name: Waykiri C-09
listings.notes: •3rd-floorcorner unit–bright, private, and airy with excellent natural light•Elevator just steps from your front door•Rooftop terracewith spectacular ocean and island views•2 bedrooms | 2.5 bathrooms•1-bedroom lockout with private entrance–perfect for guests or rental income•Two private balconies/terraces•Modern kitchen with premium finishes•Fully furnished – move-in or rental ready•Two swimming pools•Three outdoor kitchens and entertaining areas•Upscale on-site restaurant•Walking distance to Aruba’s famous beaches•Turn-key property–ready for immediate use or vacation rental income•Excellent short-term rental potential

listings.name: Isla Bonita Penthouse
listings.notes: Elevate your lifestyle with this extraordinary ocean-facing corner penthouse atIsla Bonita Residences, just steps from the iconicEagle Beach. Spanning 210 m² (2,260 sq. ft.) across two elegant levels and complemented by over 100 m² of private outdoor living, this residence captures breathtaking 360° island and Caribbean views. Fully finished in timeless travertine stone, the design blends sophistication with seamless indoor–outdoor flow.

listings.name: Oceania One Bedroom Condo 1,050 sqft
listings.notes: Spanning approximately1,050 sq. ft., this beautifully curated residence showcases a seamless fusion of modern sophistication and relaxed Caribbean charm. The light-filled living space opens onto aprivate balcony with BBQ, where tranquil island views and warm ocean breezes set the tone for effortless indoor-outdoor living. This condo has a great ROI already.The HOA fee is $112 per month!

listings.name: Diamante 235A, Gold Coast
listings.notes: Centrally located in Noord, Gold Coast is minutes fromArashi Beach, Malmok Beach, Tierra del Sol Golf Course, and a short drive toPalm Beachwith its restaurants, shopping, and nightlife. This location makes the property highly attractive for both personal use and rental purposes.

listings.name: Las Rocas 14A
listings.notes: The condo featuresspacious bedroomsfilled with natural light, designed for both relaxation and functionality. Therecently renovated kitchenis modern and fully equipped, seamlessly connecting to the living and dining area—ideal for entertaining or everyday living. Both bathrooms have been upgraded withstylish new vanities, adding a fresh and elegant touch.

listings.name: Oceanfront Studio Condo with Panoramic Ocean Views | Azure 622
listings.notes: Located on the 6th floor of the prestigious Azure Beach Residences, this beautifully updated oceanfront studio offers a rare combination of breathtaking Caribbean views, resort-style amenities, and strong investment potential in one of Aruba’s most desirable beachfront communities.

listings.name: Azure Beach Residences Unit 122
listings.notes: Inside, you’ll find 45 m² (484 ft²) of thoughtfully designed living space, while the highlight is your very own 26 m² (281 ft²) private outdoor area with direct access to the pool, just steps from your door. It’s a wonderful spot to soak up the sun, fire up the grill for a meal, or simply unwind - like having your very own outdoor living room.

listings.name: Palm Aruba 216 – Your Private Oasis in the Heart of Palm Beach
listings.notes: Inside, this contemporary condo boasts a bright open layout, with two large sliding doors that fill the space with natural light. The sleek kitchen features a nice island with bar seating, plenty of cabinetry, and a washer and dryer smartly tucked away. At the back of the unit, you'll find two well-sized bedrooms with built-in closets. The primary suite has its own ensuite, while a second full bathroom serves the guest room.

listings.name: YOO Aruba - Branded Residences Oranjestad
listings.notes: Grand lobby, concierge service, 24-hour security, controlled access, property management, valet parking where applicable, housekeeping, maintenance, and owner or guest assistance.

listings.name: Commandeurs A-14 Turn key condo on the 4th floor
listings.notes: Set in a quiet, more private area of the island, the location provides a peaceful retreat while still being just a 5‑minute drive to Eagle Beach, perfect for enjoying Aruba’s world‑famous coastline without the daily bustle. From your balcony, enjoy wide‑open views of the Aloe fields and the surrounding neighborhood.

listings.name: Aruba's Life Condos - Palm Beach, Noord (2BDR)
listings.notes: Indulge in the ultimate Aruban lifestyle at Aruba's Life, where dreams become reality! Our exceptional condo residence offers spacious units at affordable prices, nestled in a serene location for unrivaled relaxation. Yet, still within easy reach of vibrant Palm Beach – perfect for exploring the island's diverse beaches at your leisure!

listings.name: Bubali Property Land
listings.notes: This property comes with approved plans for building 52 units, making it an excellent investment opportunity for developers or individuals looking to capitalize on Aruba's thriving local and international market. Don't miss out on this chance to own a piece of paradise in a highly sought-after location.Features:

listings.name: Catalina Estates Lot 1 - Tierra del Sol
listings.notes: Surrounded by luxury residences, breathtaking natural scenery, and the island’s renowned golf course lifestyle, this spacious lot provides the ideal setting to create your perfect home in Aruba. Enjoy privacy, tranquility, and convenient access to Aruba’s beautiful beaches, restaurants, and premium amenities.

listings.name: Exceptional Plot - Tierra del Sol – La Colina 1,432 m²
listings.notes: Prime Location | La Colina 19Perched on a gentle slope, this lot provides the perfect elevation to create stunning panoramic views once your dream home is built. Whether you envision modern elegance or a timeless Caribbean estate, the natural contours of this property elevate every possibility.

listings.name: Villa Park Property Opal
listings.notes: As anarchitect and real estate professional, I offer a complete one-stop solution to bring your vision to life:✔️Design plans already prepared and ready for permit✔️ Streamlined path from purchase to construction✔️ Guidance from concept to completion

listings.name: Primavera 85
listings.notes: Seize a remarkable opportunity to own 2,645 m² (28,417 Sq Ft) of property land in the peaceful and well-established neighborhood of Primavera, Aruba. With its exceptional size, this property provides the freedom to realize your plans without limitation.

listings.name: Saliña Property Land
listings.notes: The property sits conveniently near the main road from Moko to Kudawecha — right by the well-known Moko Snack Corner at the crossing — making it easy to access while still offering a sense of privacy. What really makes this property stand out is its flexibility. The land can be subdivided into two individual plots, giving you a unique opportunity to build two villas, each with its own space and privacy. Or, if you prefer, design one expansive luxury estate and make the most of the large grounds in this top-tier location.ROPV: Landelijk LG1 gebied

listings.name: Butucu Property land
listings.notes: This beautiful plot offers the perfect balance between nature and luxury. Whether you dream of a spacious estate with every imaginable amenity or see a smart investment in developing multiple lots, this land has it all.

listings.name: Pastoor Hendrikstraat 1691m2 Property Land
listings.notes: This property comes with approved permits for the construction of 13 apartments, allowing you to move forward with your project without the delays of initial planning approvals. Whether you are an experienced developer or looking to expand your real estate portfolio, this is a ready-to-build opportunity in a growing area.

listings.name: Savaneta Property Land
listings.notes: ROPV Link for rules and regulations on the main road:https://www.arcgis.com/apps/webappviewer/index.html?id=38891684b5404974a15860c00a0defd6For information or to schedule a viewing please contactCado de Lannoy📧cado.delannoy@kw-aruba.com📱+2975941420

listings.name: CUDI, Noord Properties
listings.notes: Don't miss out on this exceptional opportunity to make your mark in Aruba's flourishing real estate landscape. For inquiries and to discuss the boundless possibilities Cudi has to offer, contact me at +297 735 7300 or via email at info@grparchitects.com. Embark on a journey to create something extraordinary in Cudi, Noord Aruba.

listings.name: House to finish for sale in Cura Cabai, San Nicolas
listings.notes: Discover a prime investment opportunity in San Nicolás, Aruba. This unfinished house is 2 minutes walk from the marineer camp. With nearby a brand new hotel and fresh developments in the area, San Nicolás is emerging as a top choice for investors. Unlike the overcrowded high-rise zones with skyrocketing prices, San Nicolás offers a peaceful, nature-surrounded escape. It’s one of the best ways to enter the Aruba market—especially for beginners looking for value. With several airbnb's in the neighborhood and a couple of beaches of 5 minutes distance and the well know Zeerovers close by with the aruba ocean villas and other restaurants, you are talking about a location that is booming and full of peace.

listings.name: Last Plots Property land in Noord - Napa Valley
listings.notes: Several lots available located in the quiet residential area of Shaba. Napa Valley is just minutes away from Eagle beach and several supermarkets, shopping centers and the Palm Beach area. This allotment plan is located in a Safe, family friendly area and is the perfect connection between Noord and Oranjestad. The infrastructure of Napa Valley is completed and the lots are ready to build on.Enjoy a relaxing way of living on this location with great traffic connection to the rest of the island! Lot sizes vary.

listings.name: Bernhardstraat 2
listings.notes: 872m2 Prime Commercial Property-land on Main Road, San Nicolas. This property land offers excellent potential for commercial development. Situated on a prominent location, it's perfect for businesses seeking high visibility and foot traffic. Don't miss out on this lucrative chance to establish your enterprise in a thriving area!"

listings.name: San Barbola property land
listings.notes: Discover a great opportunity to build your dream home in the peaceful and established neighborhood of San Barbola. This522 m² parcel of landoffers ample space to design and build a comfortable residence in a quiet residential setting.

listings.name: Rooi Afo lot 431m2
listings.notes: The property is just a short drive from supermarkets, schools, and other everyday amenities, making it ideal for a family residence or a vacation home.

listings.name: Savaneta Land
listings.notes: Seize the opportunity to invest in a piece of paradise right in the area of Savaneta. This plot invites future home owners or real estate investors  to invest in it's full potential being just 10 minutes away from Aruba’s world famous sun-soaked beaches such as Mangel Halto and Baby Beach.

listings.name: Weg Rooi Hundo Lot
listings.notes: The lot has recently been cleared. However, in its current condition, it isnot yet possible to obtain a building permit, as there is no approved Ministerial Decree in place and no road infrastructure has been constructed at this time. If you are looking to invest in land for the (long-term) future, this could present an interesting opportunity!

listings.name: Santa Helenastraat 23 Commercial building
listings.notes: The main building (3,504 m²) is centered around wide, open-air hallways that promote natural airflow. It contains over 25 multi-purpose rooms, including classrooms, laboratories, testing centers, and support spaces—all of which are individually climate-controlled with split-unit air conditioning and equipped with private bathrooms. These rooms can easily be reconfigured into offices, clinics, or retail units.

listings.name: Lux Villas with additional properties
listings.notes: Property description:This boutique luxury apartment complex offers a rare opportunity to own in one of Aruba’s most in-demand rental markets, just 5 minutes from Eagle Beach. Designed for high-performing short-term rentals, the property blends minimalist luxury with tropical appeal—exactly what today’s travelers are booking. With 9 turnkey apartments, a resort-style pool, and additional 3 plots for expansion with permission to construct an additional six apartments, this is an ideal acquisition for investors seeking strong cash flow, appreciation, and scalability.The Residences:Constructed in 2019 Lux Villas in Bubali, features 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, sleeping 4 guests comfortably—a proven layout for maximizing occupancy and nightly rates. Open-plan living, private patios, and unique finishes create a strong competitive edge in Aruba’s luxury rental market, especially being just a couple minutes away from highlights like, Eagle Beach, restaurants, schools, supermarkets and gas stations.

listings.name: Large Commercial Building in Prime Location | Frankrijkstraat 7
listings.notes: Originally designed for office use, the building offers a functional and flexible layout across both levels. The ground floor includes multiple office spaces, storage rooms, hallways, and six restrooms. The second floor mirrors this setup with additional offices, storage areas, six restrooms, and a cafeteria, making the property suitable for a wide range of commercial applications.

listings.name: Prime Commercial Building in Oranjestad | Frankrijkstraat 9
listings.notes: Position your business in one of Aruba’s most strategic commercial locations with this well-located two-story property in the heart of the island’s business district. Situated at Frankrijkstraat 9, this versatile building offers excellent accessibility, just minutes from Oranjestad, Noord, the airport, the harbor, and the island’s main highway.

listings.name: Wayaca 33D - commercial property
listings.notes: An exceptional opportunity to acquire a large-scale commercial complex in the highly strategic business district of Wayaca, located within close proximity to the Queen Beatrix International Airport. This versatile property offers a functional combination of office spaces, warehouse facilities, and extensive parking, making it ideal for logistics companies, distribution operations, import/export businesses, or corporate headquarters.

listings.name: Cadushi apartments
listings.notes: Cadushi Apartments offers an inviting outdoor area featuring a community pool, a covered patio, and a BBQ area, perfect for guests to gather and enjoy the tropical surroundings. The property’s vibrant exterior, adorned in colorful hues, enhances the island’s lively atmosphere and is complemented by lush palmtrees and tropical plants.

listings.name: Stadionweg 19, Oranjestad - Sea Breeze Apartment Complex
listings.notes: Supported by Aruba’s resilient tourism market and limited availability of well-located multi-unit vacation rental properties, this asset represents a compelling value-add opportunity for investors seeking scalable short-term rental income and long-term appreciation. In walking distance from Surfside Beach and a couple blocks away from he best restaurants of Oranjestad like Barefoot, Reflections Beach & Pinchos.For information, viewings and to present it's full potential please contact Cado de Lannoy 📧cado.delannoy@kw-aruba.com📱 +2975941420Note: this property is currently a non exclusive listing

listings.name: Galileistraat 2 Oranjestad
listings.notes: Location & Setting:The property is situated on a quiet, dead-end paved road—just off Van Leeuwenhoek Street—east of the Maria College school complex in Oranjestad. Nestled in a peaceful residential neighborhood, the area is characterized by well-maintained homes, several of which have been recently renovated. Despite its tranquil setting, the property is just a short walk from the vibrant center of Oranjestad, offering a perfect balance of privacy and accessibility.

listings.name: Pega Pega Apartments
listings.notes: Pega Pega Apartments is an affordable yet promising investment opportunity located on a 601 m² parcel of land in the heart of Oranjestad, within walking distance of Surfside Beach. While the property may need updates, it presents remarkable potential for future growth and is already established as an attractive budget-friendly option for both short-term and long-term rentals. With its prime location, Pega Pega Apartments is ideal for those seeking a low-cost entry into the Aruban hospitality market.

listings.name: Authentic German Restaurant
listings.notes: Great Opportunity for Growth:While the restaurant is already thriving, there is significant potential for expansion. The introduction of catering services, increased social media presence, and more targeted marketing could help bring in even more customers. Additionally, the restaurant’s reputation and brand are already strong, giving the new owner a great foundation to build on.

listings.name: Santa Cruz 248
listings.notes: Positioned directly across from the busy Mundo Nobo Supermarket and on the road to the popular Huchada and Urataka Restaurants, this 873 m² parcel of land features a 281 m² built-up area, ready for renovation or a complete redesign. With constant foot traffic, excellent visibility, and easy accessibility, this property is perfect for a retail store, local eatery, office hub, or a multi-purpose commercial space.

listings.name: Prime Commercial Property on High-Traffic Main Road
listings.notes: With its significant size and prime location, this property offers a solid investment opportunity with potential for steady appreciation. Given its location near the harbor development area, it also presents possibilities for ambitious future development. Ideal for a range of uses, including retail, office space, or warehousing, this versatile property is perfect for strategic investment or as a dynamic startup location.

listings.name: Casa Treasure Price on request!!!!
listings.notes: IntroducingCasa Treasure, a unique and amazing investment opportunity available by silent listing for serious buyers only. This well-maintained apartment complex features 18 units, 12 studios and 6 spacious 2-bedroom apartments; perfectly suited for long-term rental. Strategically designed for maximum return, the property offers both privacy and potential, making it a rare gem in Aruba’s real estate market.Serious investors onlyare invited to explore this exceptional opportunity.

listings.name: CASA Bon Bini
listings.notes: For those desiring a more intimate ambiance, Model 2 showcases 12 basic apartments, each consisting of one bedroom with a Queen bed and one bathroom, providing a cozy sanctuary spanning 40 square meters of tastefully designed simplicity. Ideal for those who value compact yet sophisticated living quarters.

listings.name: Casa Luminosa
listings.notes: The property’s smart layout and versatile design make it easy to adapt and expand. Investors can choose to keep it as a steady, income-generating rental property, transform it into a short-stay vacation hotspot, or develop it into a unique mixed-use concept that stands out in Aruba’s growing hospitality industry.

listings.name: CASA Distinct
listings.notes: Now let's take you on a stroll through the perfectly landscaped outside space. Take a refreshing plunge from the diving board into the depths of the pool or relax in the outdoor Jacuzzi. Gatherings around the fire pit or hanging out at the BBQ Grill are guaranteed fun  and outdoor dining in this house gives a whole new twist to dining Al Fresco with views that last for days! The LED lights infused in the pool should add instant ambiance at any social event and the well maintained garden will keep the moment magical thanks to the automated irrigation system.

listings.name: CASA Warehouse Pos Chiquito
listings.notes: This warehouse facility presents a prime opportunity for businesses seeking a centrally located, spacious, and well-structured facility to streamline their operations. The thoughtful layout, combined with the strategic location, makes it an ideal choice for those in search of a functional and accessible commercial space in Aruba.

listings.name: CASA Atlantic 360 (Penthouse)
listings.notes: This3-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom penthouseis designed for bothluxury living and high-yield investment potential. Each suite functions as aprivate retreat with its own ensuite bathroom, including a master suite with a private balcony anduninterrupted ocean views. The spacious floor plan comfortably accommodates up to12 guests, making it ideal for families, vacation rentals, or a sophisticated island escape.

listings.name: CASA Paradera Lot
listings.notes: Nestled close to key attractions and amenities, the location provides an ideal setting for various types of development projects. Whether your vision includes a residential community, a commercial enterprise, or a recreational facility, this property’s prime location and generous size make it an excellent choice.

listings.name: CASA HideAway
listings.notes: The main house has 5 bedrooms, spread out over 2 floors. The primary bedroom is located on the second floor and has it's own en-suite bathroom including a nice big bathtub, walk-in closet balcony and hallway, making it the perfect private suite to escape after a long day of all the hustle and bustle. On the other side of the second floor are the 2nd & 3rd bedrooms with the shared 2nd bathroom, also with a tub. The ground floor is accessed through the majestical entrance that leads to the fully equipped kitchen, fit for a chef. The kitchen is open concept to the dining room on one side and half open concept to the separate living room on the other side. Next to the dining room is a study / office space that can be closed off for privacy. The ground floor also provides a half bath for guests and a separate laundry room. Attached to the main house is an extra apartment/in-law suite, with a bathroom and kitchen/living room. This apartment is accessible from the inside and outside.

listings.name: CASA Le Vente unit 508
listings.notes: Situated within a luxurious condominium resort, this property offers an exclusive ocean view that serves as a daily reminder of the beauty and tranquility of the Caribbean coast. From the spacious balcony, residents can bask in the captivating sight of the azure waters meeting the powdery white sands, creating an ambiance of unparalleled serenity.

listings.name: CASA Triple BBB
listings.notes: CASA Triple BBB is the place to live!!!!.  ThisBest, veryBest and can not beBetter property is located in North Aruba just 2 minutes walk to the ocean to kite surf, surf and al kind of other water activities, shopping mall with al its entertainment; cinema, shops, the finest restaurant and bars. Just around the corner of the High Rise Hotel Area and Casinos.'Just the perfect spot to live.

listings.name: Koyari 37A - La Casa Più Bella
listings.notes: The interior offers a spacious layout, modern kitchen, and multiple lounging areas. Step outside and you’ll find your private resort: a sparkling pool,soothing jacuzzi, palapa for shaded relaxation, full BBQ setup,and a tropical garden. Guests enjoy an outdoor shower and dedicated changing room for comfort and convenience.

listings.name: Exclusive Luxury Villa at Malmok
listings.notes: Indulge in the ultimate luxury living experience with this exceptional villa, located just steps away from the pristine beaches of Malmok. Positioned in one of Aruba’s most sought-after neighborhoods, this magnificent property seamlessly blends sophistication with comfort, offering a truly unparalleled island lifestyle.

listings.name: Caya Musica 14-E
listings.notes: * The master bathroom is a luxurious retreat, featuring an elegant freestanding bathtub, an enclosed toilet room, and a large electronically controlled privacy glass window that offers stunning backyard views.

listings.name: Santorini Style Villa at Alto Vista
listings.notes: Introducing this fully renovated and fully furnished two-story Santorini-style Villa situated on a spacious 1156 m² parcel on a scenic hill of Alto Vista and providing a relaxing retreat with breathtaking views, ultimate privacy, and exceptional comfort living. The property features a 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom main house, two apartments, patios and terraces, and an exclusive pool and jacuzzi.

listings.name: Ocean View Estate with Rental Income Potential – Alto Vista, Aruba
listings.notes: Whether you're seeking a luxury private residence, an income-producing investment, or a combination of both, Alto Vista 117 offers exceptional flexibility. The separate apartments provide immediate rental opportunities while the main residence remains ideal for owner occupancy or premium vacation rentals.

listings.name: San Barbola Residence 277
listings.notes: The fully fenced property offers an inviting outdoor setting with a swimming pool featuring an integrated jacuzzi, gazebo, and beautifully landscaped tropical garden with several trees and greenery. Whether relaxing by the pool, dining under the covered patio, or spending time with family and friends outdoors, the property provides ample space to enjoy Aruba's year-round climate. The rooftop terrace adds an additional outdoor living area, ideal for entertaining, relaxing, or simply enjoying the island breeze.

listings.name: Kibrahachastraat 5
listings.notes: Discover your own piece of paradise in the heart of Ponton, Aruba, with this extraordinary property that offers a truly unique and versatile living experience. Nestled on a sprawling 1517 m² property land, this stunning estate is a dream come true, combining luxury living with fantastic income potential. Let's take a closer look at what this property has to offer:

listings.name: Seroe blanco 45d
listings.notes: A HOME THAT COMMANDS ATTENTIONThe exterior speaks before you even step inside. Terracotta clay roof tiles crown the striking grey metropolis façade, visible even from above — as the dramatic aerial views reveal a property that dominates its corner with quiet authority. Mature palms, flowering desert roses, and manicured garden beds soften the architecture into something that feels both regal and welcoming. String-lit evenings under the solar-panelled carport canopy transform the courtyard into an entertainer's dream.INTERIORS DESIGNED FOR THE DISCERNINGStep inside the main residence and be greeted by brilliant white ceilings, recessed lighting, and an open living space that flows effortlessly between zones. The living room makes a bold design statement — rich dark leather sectional seating, a vivid red shag rug, and a gallery-scale rose artwork create a space that is simultaneously dramatic and deeply comfortable. A wall-mounted entertainment system and arc floor lamp complete the picture of effortless sophistication.The kitchen is a chef's delight: pristine white shaker cabinetry reaches ceiling height, black granite countertops provide striking contrast, and top-line stainless appliances — including a gas range, built-in microwave, and deep double sink — make entertaining a pleasure rather than a chore. Every surface, every fitting, has been chosen with care.SPACE, PRIVACY, AND VERSATILITYWith four bedrooms the main house and three apartments, five bathrooms, and multiple independent living areas — each with its own kitchen and split-unit air conditioning — this property gives everyone their own world while keeping the family beautifully connected. The upper floor master retreat offers a peaceful sanctuary, accessed by an elegant open wooden staircase with a sculptural balustrade.SUN, ENERGY & SUSTAINABILITYAruba's golden sun does more than warm your mornings here — a ±10 kW solar panel system mounted on the carport roof keeps energy costs low and your environmental conscience clear. The property is fully connected to electricity, water, cable, and features a security camera system throughout.THE NUMBERS THAT JUSTIFY EVERY DOLLAROfficially appraised in March 2026 by ARCOTEC N.V. at a market value of USD 1,016,292.13 this property is priced with purpose below the market value, What you see in the asking price is not speculation; it is substance, quality, and enduring value confirmed by independent experts.This is not a property you simply buy. It is one you experience, fall in love with, and never want to leave.Schedule your private viewing today — some homes deserve to be felt in person.

listings.name: Esmeralda 32
listings.notes: This exceptional property, located in a prime area, is not just a home, but a canvas for a world of possibilities. Featuring a spacious main house with 2 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms, alongside two separate 1-bedroom apartments, Esmeralda 32 offers unparalleled versatility.

listings.name: Seroe Alejandro 18-D
listings.notes: Whether you are searching for a primary residence, a vacation retreat, or an investment opportunity, Seroe Alejandro 18-D presents an exceptional opportunity to acquire a beautifully updated home with modern comforts, outstanding outdoor living spaces, and lasting value. Conveniently located just north of the main road connecting Pos Chiquito and San Nicolas, the property enjoys a quiet residential setting while remaining within easy reach of beaches, schools, shops, restaurants, and other everyday amenities.

listings.name: Bucutiweg 5
listings.notes: When entering this waterfront villa you will be greeted by a bright and airy open floor plan. The house features an open spacious living room, open dining room, and open kitchen. This home offers 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms plus an extra 1 bedroom and 1 bathroom apartment with its own entrance and kitchen. As well there is a big pool in the spacious garden in the back of the villa.

listings.name: Washington 42D
listings.notes: Experience the pinnacle of elegance and comfort in thisexquisite 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom luxury residencenestled in the tranquil and highly sought-after neighborhood ofWashington, Noord. Designed with sophistication in mind, this home blends refined finishes with modern convenience and the perfect retreat for discerning buyers seeking privacy, space, and style.

listings.name: Seroe Blanco 52-L
listings.notes: Inside, an open and airy layout seamlessly connects the living, dining, and kitchen areas, creating a welcoming atmosphere for both everyday living and entertaining. The home features four spacious bedrooms, including one currently used as a home office, along with two well-appointed bathrooms. The fully equipped kitchen with breakfast bar serves as the heart of the home, while the adjacent laundry room adds everyday convenience. Quality finishes enhance both comfort and efficiency, including PVC exterior doors with double glazing and a combination of cedarwood, PVC, and aluminum window frames that reflect durability and thoughtful craftsmanship. Adding to the home’s versatility is a private one-bedroom apartment with an ensuite bathroom attached to the garage. This space is ideal for guests, extended family, a private workspace, or potential rental income.

listings.name: Caya Areroet 16
listings.notes: The front of the house has two designer entrances with beautiful wooden details. The car entrance with a unique wooden electric gate to the driveway (parking space for 4-5 cars) that leads to the amazing garden and the back door. The other entrance comes with a very nice floating staircase to the front door and front porch with a view of the island.

listings.name: Babijn 21F
listings.notes: The master bedroom features an en-suite bathroom and a walk-in closet, offering comfort and privacy. Two additional bedrooms share the second bathroom, making the layout practical and well-suited for families or guests. From the office windows, you look directly onto a striking natural stone wall, and from the master bedroom and bathroom, a dramatic roof-height rock formation becomes a unique and grounding design element: constant reminders of the natural surroundings that define this home.

listings.name: Gray Door Apartments - Commercial Investment
listings.notes: Three ground-floor apartments boast two bedrooms and two bathrooms, while four one-bedroom apartments are on the first floor. The garden one-bedroom apartment is conveniently located on the ground floor. The stunning penthouse, with two bedrooms and two bathrooms, offers breathtaking views of Aruba. It comes complete with a private driveway, elevator, and a jacuzzi on the terrace. The master suite is a true sanctuary, featuring an open bathroom with a bathtub, double shower, and a 10-foot projector screen for your entertainment.

listings.name: L’Aquilla Modern Coastal living Unit 102 type B Level 1
listings.notes: Located in theheart of Eagle Beach, residents enjoy an unbeatable lifestyle — just a short beach walk from white sand, with easy access to local restaurants, cafes, shopping, and entertainment. The project’s placement and design make it especially appealing forfull-time island living, vacation homes, or rental investment opportunities.

listings.name: Luxurious Penthouse Offering Breathtaking Aruba Views
listings.notes: Step into the master suite - a sanctuary of indulgence and relaxation. With an open-concept bathroom, you'll find solace in a bathtub that invites you to unwind after a long day. A double shower offers a refreshing experience, while the 10-foot projector screen transforms your downtime into an entertainment spectacle.

listings.name: Washington Gardens - 3 Bedrooms | 3 Bathrooms
listings.notes: A luxurious two-level, three-bedroom home of 189.89 m² (2,044 sq.ft.) with expansive terraces and a dedicated TV room. This is the premier residence at Washington Gardens.Highlights:- Private internal staircase- Large terrace on the upper level- Walk-in closet in primary suite- Ideal for multi-generational living or owners seeking maximum space

listings.name: Nanki at Rodgers Beach Aruba
listings.notes: Located in the heart of San Nicolas,Nanki at Rodgers Beachis Aruba’s newest whole-ownership boutique condo-hotel offering an exceptional blend of oceanfront elegance, modern design, and Caribbean charm. With just 40 exclusive residences, this private collection of luxury condos redefines barefoot eco-luxury living on the island’s serene southern coast.

listings.name: Acqua 317
listings.notes: This unit features a modern open layout, a master bedroom with private bath, a well equipped kitchen, and a laundry room with washer and dryer. As an owner, you'll enjoy exclusive access to all Radisson Blu Aruba amenities, including a rooftop pool, fitness center, restaurant, valet parking, and a shuttle to the beach.

listings.name: The Moon Residence
listings.notes: Moon Aruba is a luxury gated community featuring 89 fully furnished apartments in the highly sought-after Rooi Santo area, Noord. Designed with elegance and modernity in mind, Moon Aruba blends peaceful living with the vibrant energy of nearby beaches and attractions. Just a short drive away from iconic locations like Boca Catalina, Arashi, and Palm Beach, residents can enjoy the best of Aruba's sun, sand, and sea.

listings.name: Washington Gardens - 2 Bedrooms | 2 Bathrooms with Large Terrace
listings.notes: Discover Washington Gardens, an exclusive community of just 26 boutique condominiums located in the peaceful Washington district. Surrounded by lush greenery and only minutes from Palm Beach, this new development offers the perfect blend of serenity and convenience.

listings.name: Nanki at Rodgers Beach Aruba
listings.notes: Located in the heart of San Nicolas,Nanki at Rodgers Beachis Aruba’s newest whole-ownership boutique condo-hotel offering an exceptional blend of oceanfront elegance, modern design, and Caribbean charm. listings.name: Gold Coast 2BR Investment | Private Jacuzzi + Balcony
listings.notes: This 104 m² single-level condominium offers a well-designed open floor plan where the kitchen, dining, and living areas flow seamlessly together, creating a bright and welcoming atmosphere for both couples and families. The private balcony provides elevated outdoor enjoyment and refreshing island breezes.

listings.name: Gold Coast 2BR Investment | Balcony + Exclusive Outdoor Space
listings.notes: What further distinguishes this residence is the exclusive-use ground-level outdoor area, currently tiled and ready for customization. This private space offers exceptional potential to create a palapa, jacuzzi or plunge pool, and BBQ lounge area — allowing a future owner to design a personalized outdoor retreat (subject to HOA approval and applicable regulations). The flexibility of this space enhances both rental desirability and long-term value positioning.

listings.name: Home at Opal
listings.notes: Become the Owner of this beautiful newly build never previously owned Villa in the up scale residential area of Opal. consisting of 4 bedroom each with its private bathroom and walk in closet. Both the bedroom on the ground floor and the master bedroom on the second floor have a private balcony and covered terrace. Entering the yard you can experience the lovely landscaping and well kept gardening, completely fenced. On the ground floor the house located on the right site you will find the first guest bedroom and on the left site you will experience a huge dining area, living area and kitchen, which is fully loaded with all stainless steel appliances. From the kitchen area you also have access to the 2 door garage where you will find the washer and dryer. The whole ground floor has big sliding doors that takes you the lovely back yard with your private pool, and also includes an outside shower and powder room. Taking the staircase to the second floor on the right site you will find the master bedroom and on the left site the other 2 bedrooms. Big sliding doors gets you to a walk way from left to right covering the whole second floor overlooking the backyard and pool area. Making this the perfect home! This villa comes completely furnished with top of the line Furniture's, a must to see and enjoy.

listings.name: Home at Opal
listings.notes: This two-story precious and luxurious 307 m2 estate is built on 804 m2 of private property land in one of the best residential areas in Aruba, close to the Palm Beach, Malmok Beach and Arashi Beach, shopping malls, high rise hotels and casinos. Entering this villa through the front door you will find on the ground floor on your right-hand side a dining area and a fully equipped kitchen and on the left side the living area. The corridor on the left side will lead you to the first bedroom with its private bathroom and walk in closet and a balcony overlooking the blue ocean of Aruba. In the back of the kitchen area, you will find a garage and a smaller second bedroom with a bathroom, private entrance and also accessible from the backyard. On the left side of the entrance, you can go to the second floor via beautiful staircase and on the right side you will find the master bedroom, private bathroom with a jacuzzi, walk in closet, and a huge balcony overlooking the ocean. On the right side of the staircase, you will find the fourth bedroom, with own balcony, bathroom and a walking closet. The backyard consists of a large patio with high quality tables and chairs, a BBQ grill that overlooks the beautiful swimming pool with a waterfall. A unique estate, premier elegancy, a must see!

listings.name: Mesa Vista 40
listings.notes: Villa Meza Vista with pool, guesthouse and garage  is located within the exclusive residential community Tierra del Sol in Aruba. Tierra del Sol Resort & Golf is Aruba’s premier lifestyle community. Located only minutes from the shopping, dining, and nightlife of Palm Beach, Tierra del Sol features an 18-hole Championship Golf Course masterfully designed by famed architect Robert Trent Jones II. Described by Golf Digest as playing Scotland, Arizona, and the Caribbean all in one round, this desert links course combines the elements of wind, sea, and earth to provide a truly exhilarating experience for golfers of all levels. Situated on nearly 600 acres of unspoiled beauty and boasting the most spectacular panoramic views on the island, Tierra del Sol offers great real estate and rental opportunities. Tierra del Sol includes a range of world-class amenities including a spa, fitness center, and tennis courts. Whether you wish to lounge by the pool, enjoy a casual lunch al fresco on the terrace, or savor a dinner at our renowned restaurant, you will enjoy the tranquility away from the crowds in the refined yet casual environs of Tierra del Sol Resort & Golf.

listings.name: Rococo Plaza Mall
listings.notes: Landmark Rococo Plaza in Aruba is now for sale. Rocco Plaza is located along the main road of Tanki Leendert and immediately recognizableby its two unique 17th century red copper domes at the entrance. It's unique and artistic domes at the entrance attract every single day a great number of tourists and local customers to the place.Rococo Plaza consists of several commercial units that are rented out. Rococo Plaza is also known for the incredible collection of European Antiques and Curiosities that is displayed in more than 20 showrooms within the plaza.The property has a land size of 2377 m2 and a total built up area of 1652 m2. The premises consist of two buildings (A and B) with two floors, two towers, a refrigerator/freezer room, a toilet block with storage and a transformer house. Building A ground floor consists of the following: office spaces, showrooms, storage, kitchen, ladies and gentlemen's toilet. Building A first floor consists of the following: showroom and storage. The total built-up area of building A is 798 m2. Building B ground floor consists of the following: antique store with office, Domino's Pizza, showrooms, denomination and an apartment. Building B first floor consists of: antique shop, pizza shop, showrooms and an apartment. The total built-up area of building B is 854 m2. The complex is located on two asphalted roads with street lighting. One road is the main road from Tanki Leendert to Paradera and the other is a branch from it which leads in the direction of Modanza. It is located approximately halfway between the Tanki Leendert roundabout and the Paradera roundabout. It is a busy traffic road and there are various homes and many commercial buildings in varying quality and size built around it.
